steps.title: Use the classification concern
steps.content: The researchers say climate change challenges labels such as invasive species. If climate change can force animals from current ranges and create new suitable habitats, then today's classifications may depend on conditions that later change.

steps.title: Reject unsupported conclusions
steps.content: A invents a prior history of rainbow lorikeets in New Zealand. B removes the climate-change premise that drives the argument. D says the label is useful in some cases but not this one, which the passage does not establish. The answer is C.
